results.name: mai
results.description: Knife-throwing teenager in a seemingly perpetual state of ennui. Also BFFs with [Ty Lee](ty-lee) and [Azula](azula), and in an on-again off-again relationship with [Zuko](zuko).

results.name: makapu village
results.description: An Earth Kingdom village in the shadow of a volcano.

results.name: malamet
results.description: A jaguar-like race of cat people living in the underground city of Ban Koj, on the plane of Ixalan.

results.name: malfegor
results.description: An ancient demon-dragon of Alara. Slain by Rafiq and Elspeth during the Conflux.

results.name: mambele
results.description: An African melee and throwing weapon with multiple prongs.

results.name: mana ability with extra effect
results.description: Mana abilities that have some extra effect upon activating them, meaning that they can do actions in strange cases such as during the casting of a split second card and usually can't be prevented in any way.

results.name: mana cost matters
results.description: Cards that care about the actual symbols in a mana cost.

results.name: mana dork
results.description: Low-cost creatures which can repeatedly generate mana

results.name: mana dork egg
results.description: Creatures that can be sacrificed to add mana.
